items.h: AEW's Eddie Kingston Had Cops Called On Him During Knicks Celebration
items.p: AEW and ROH star Eddie Kingston is a diehard New York Knicks fan. He shared the story of getting the cops called on him when he was celebrating a big win.

items.h: Eric Bischoff Blames Lack Of WWE Crossover For TNA Not Surpassing AEW In Popularity
items.p: Eric Bischoff blames the lack of crossover between WWE and TNA as the reason why TNA has been unable to surpass AEW in popularity as #2 promotion
